• Experience with APIs, integrations & system design
• Solid understanding of SDLC
• Familiarity with Git, CI/CD pipelines & Agile methodologies
• Strong problem-solving & analytical skills
• Good communication & teamwork abilities

⭐ Additional Requirements:
• Willingness to travel as per project needs
• Ability to work in general shift
• Self-driven and comfortable in remote environments

📩 Apply Now: pravalika.t@martinettechnologies.com

extracted.full_content:
Jhugnu Techno Solutions

18 followers

We’re Hiring: AI Architect & AWS Architect

At Jhugnu Techno Solutions, we are actively looking for experienced professionals who can design, scale, and lead next-generation technology solutions.

If you have a strong foundation in AI/ML or Cloud Architecture, this is an opportunity to work on impactful, enterprise-level projects.

Open Roles

1. AI Architect
8+ years in AI/ML projects
Strong expertise in Machine Learning, NLP, Python, TensorFlow
Experience with Cloud AI Services (AWS, Azure ML)

2. AWS Architect
10+ years in Cloud Architecture
Hands-on with AWS, EC2, Lambda, Terraform
Strong exposure to DevOps & Cloud Migration strategies

🌍 What We Offer
✔ Contract & Permanent Opportunities
✔ Fast-track Hiring Process
✔ Global Opportunities (H1B & beyond)
✔ Career Coaching & Profile Optimization

📩 How to Apply
📞 +91-9032784883
📧 raveendraiah@jhugnutec.com

💡 Why This Role Matters
This is not just another job opening.

We are looking for professionals who can architect scalable systems, drive innovation, and influence business outcomes through technology.
